gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على الشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 565)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على الشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 565)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ (عليه السلام) كَيْفَ تَقْرَأُ وَ عَلَى الثَّلاثَةِ الَّذِينَ خُلِّفُوا قَالَ لَوْ كَانَ خُلِّفُوا لَكَانُوا فِي حَالِ طَاعَةٍ وَ لَكِنَّهُمْ خَالَفُوا عُثْمَانُ وَ صَاحِبَاهُ أَمَا وَ اللَّهِ مَا سَمِعُوا صَوْتَ حَافِرٍ وَ لَا قَعْقَعَةَ حَجَرٍ إِلَّا قَالُوا أُتِينَا فَسَلَّطَ اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِمُ الْخَوْفَ حَتَّى أَصْبَحُوا.

en.hubeali: H 15015 – Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Salih Bin Al-Sanady, from Ja’far Bin Basheer, rom Fayz Bin Al-Mukhtar, who has narrated the following:

‘I said to Abu Abdullahasws, ‘How do youasws read “[9:118] And to the three who were left behind”. Heasws said; ‘Had they been left behind (Khulifu), they would be in a state of obedience. But, they opposed (Khaalafu) – Usman and his two companions (Abu Bakr and Umar). But, by Allahazwj, they did not hear the sound of hooves, or the rumble of the pebbles except that they said, ‘They are coming for us!’ Allahazwj Made fear to overcome them until the morning’.
en.sarwar: 569. Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al-Hakam, from Ali Bin Abu Hamza, from Abu Baseer, who has said: Abu Ja’far (a.s.) said: ‘Are you (a.s.) reciting: “[9:112] They who repent (Al-Ta’iboun), who serve (Al-Abidoun)”?’ So he (a.s.) said: ‘No. Recite “Al-Ta’ibeen Al-Abideen” upto the end of it’. So I asked about the reason for that, he (a.s.) said: ‘He (azwj) Bought from the Believers (their own selves), the repentant (and) the worshippers’.
